title: distephanus divaricatus
intro: Distephanus divaricatus, also known as the bushy distephanus or bushy disteph, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Distephanus divaricatus are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically harvested, dried, and used as a tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
